/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/SoulForgeSynth.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/SoulForgeSynth.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/SoulForgeSynth.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -o SoulForgeSynth.vst3 -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/SoulForgeSynth.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/SoulForgeSynth.dir/linkLibs.rsp
